Joints are very closely to closely spaced, rough planar and rough stepped, iron and manganese oxide staining, dipping at 0 degrees to 10 degrees, 0 degrees to 20 degrees and 65 degrees to 75 degrees.

No recovery, assumed to be completely decomposed TUFF.
